deutsche-bank-aktiengesellschaft.summary: BaFin fines and special-audit orders for inadequate AML controls (Postbank integration) and historical Mirror Trading exposure; ongoing supervisory measures.

volkswagen-usa.summary: €1B BaFin / Braunschweig prosecutor fine (Jun 2018) for breach of supervisory duty in the diesel emissions scandal.

porsche.raw_name: Porsche AG / Porsche Automobil Holding SE
porsche.summary: €535M Stuttgart prosecutor fine (2016) for negligent breach of supervisory duty in the diesel emissions case.
